nasb.text: “The south side toward the south shall extend from Tamar as far as the waters of Meribath-kadesh, to the brook of Egypt and to the Great Sea. This is the south side toward the south.

esv.text: “On the south side, it shall run from Tamar as far as the waters of Meribah-kadesh, from there along the Brook of Egypt to the Great Sea. This shall be the south side.

cnv.text: 南面的地界，從他瑪到米利巴．加低斯水，經埃及小河，到大海。這是南面的地界。

ccb.text: “南界从他玛西经米利巴·加低斯泉和埃及小河直到地中海。
